name: cistreaming
description: Dev workflow preset for the cistreaming platform (NestJS + Next.js + SRS + GraphQL). Replaces v2's private dev-task / quick-fix orchestration with the public w-* command suite (driven by .claude/workflow.yaml) and swaps build-ui-kit / build-static-page / streaming-figma for the f-* Figma suite. Keeps v2's streaming-specific rules + private utility skills for opt-in fallbacks.
